turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I'd like to schedule an appointment with a dermatologist. I have some skin rashes that won't go away.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course, I can help with that. May I have your name and contact number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you Kartik. Dr. Sneha Kulkarni is our dermatologist. She has slots available this week on Wednesday and Friday.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Wednesday would work. What times are available?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We have 10 AM, 12 PM, and 3 PM on Wednesday.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Booked! Kartik Desai, Wednesday at 12:00 PM with Dr. Sneha Kulkarni. Confirmation SMS will follow.
